author: anon-581fd578
content: Observation: The CPU-side render pipeline is complete (BatchBuilder produces rect/glyph/shadow/image instances, shaders exist as .wgsl). But there is ZERO wgpu integration — no Device, Surface, Queue, or RenderPipeline anywhere. The Renderer is purely CPU. Need to build the entire GPU layer: wgpu init, pipeline creation from existing shaders, buffer upload, render pass execution, and surface present. Also need text shaping in flatten_node_to_render.
